title: GoldenMaus's Steel Tools
description: A lightweight mod that adds balanced steel tools and armor.
body:
### **A vanilla-friendly mid-game upgrade for your Minecraft adventures!**

This mod adds a complete steel tool and armor set, and a simple manual ore processing system, crafted to fit Minecraft’s design philosophy.

## 🔩 Features Overview:
⚔️ Steel Tools & Armor
Crafted with Steel Ingots, this gear is:

- Stronger than iron 🛡️
 
- Faster than iron ⛏️
  
- Uses diamond-tier mining level 💎

Full support for vanilla-style crafting recipes (pickaxe, sword, helmet, etc.)

Designed to feel like a natural extension of vanilla progression

## ⚙️ Steel Production Chain
### 🪨 Crushing Materials (with the help of hammers)

Just put coal or an iron ingot into the crafting table along with a hammer, and you have some crushed iron/coal

### 🧪 Crafting Steel Blend
Combine 4 Crushed Iron + 1 Crushed Coal → 2 Steel Blend

A balanced recipe to reward effort and resource investment

### 🔥 Smelting Steel
Steel Blend can only be smelted in a Blast Furnace!

This makes production a little bit more balanced.

Output: Steel Ingot

### 🏗️ Steel Block & Beacon Support
Steel Ingots can be crafted into Steel Blocks (9x ingots)

Steel Blocks are fully beacon-compatible 

### ♻️ Tool & Armor Recycling
All steel tools and armor pieces can be smelted in a Furnace to recover Steel Nuggets

Steel Nuggets can be crafted into steel ingots

### 🧩 Mod Compatibility & Tag Support
All items and blocks are properly tagged for:

- Cross mod compatability
  
- Crafting recipes
  
- Ore dictionary systems
  

### Designed for seamless integration into modpacks
